content.en:
At the moment, many of the perfect controllers are speculating about why.

"Why didn't Ye Tian enter the Extreme Dao List?"

"Could it be that Ye Tian has become the perfect controller of the Void Realm? Impossible, he was still in the Extreme Creation Realm before, how could he become the perfect controller of the Void Realm in the blink of an eye?"

"Ye Tian can't become the perfect controller of the Void Realm, he should still be the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm now, will it be a fall?"

"Ye Tian is a member of the Eternal Ruins Wudao Tower, and according to my information, he has not fallen. If he had fallen, the news would have come out long ago, and it would also cause the wrath of the Wudao Tower. "

"There is only one possibility, Ye Tian did not enter the space-time ancestral realm, perhaps for some reason, he did not come in for the time being. "

"Maybe Ye Tian hasn't made much progress, and he thinks that his ranking is still like that, so he didn't come in, anyway, he can stay in the space-time ancestral realm for hundreds of millions of eternal years, so he doesn't care!"

"Ye Tian doesn't enter the Extreme Dao List, which is equivalent to vacating a place, which is a good thing! If the super perfect controllers of the last Extreme Dao List don't enter the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, it will be good!"

......

However, those super-perfect controllers at the top of the Extreme Dao Mountain knew very well that Ye Tian's progress was absolutely incomparably great, otherwise he would not be able to enter the top of the Extreme Dao Mountain.

It stands to reason that if Ye Tian enters the Space-Time Ancestral Realm this time, his ranking will definitely rise significantly, and he can cultivate for many more years.

They thought about it, but they couldn't understand why Ye Tian didn't enter the space-time ancestral realm.

After all, there's nothing more important than getting into the Pole List, right?

After all, you only need to come in once, and if you really have something, you can go out immediately!

No Road Tower.

The master of the moon glass didn't understand why Ye Tian didn't go to the space-time ancestral realm, and it stands to reason that it was impossible to forget the time!

And the Lord of the Ancient Heavens was also a little puzzled when he got that Ye Tian had not entered the Space-Time Ancestral Realm.

"Strange, if he enters the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, Ye Tian can have a lot more time to cultivate, what a great opportunity this is!No, I have to urge him to enter the Space-Time Ancestral Realm!"

After all, the Extreme Dao List has not yet been decided, and if Ye Tian enters now, the ranking of the Extreme Dao List will still change, and let him be on the list.

Airplanes!

After the Lord of the Ancient contacted Ye Tian, he immediately came to the branch tower of the Daoless Tower where Ye Tian was, and immediately saw Ye Tian.

"Huh......"

The Lord of the Ancient took a look at Ye Tian, and immediately felt that Ye Tian was not ordinary, as if he was an extreme creature, and the breath of life was extremely terrifying.

Although he is still a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, his strength seems to be infinitely close to that of a super-level perfect controller.

How powerful could a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm be? He was a little unbelievable.

"I've seen the Lord of the Ancients!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty asked, "Ye Tian, now that the Extreme Dao List of the Space-Time Ancestral Realm has opened, why don't you enter?" The Extreme Path Mountain is a rare opportunity for you, and if you increase the time for practicing and contemplating enlightenment, you will be able to hope that you will be able to comprehend your own Extreme Path! Even if you can't attain enlightenment, you can greatly improve your strength by contemplating more Extreme Path, or continuing to comprehend and strengthen the Extreme Path. In the future, once you can't enter the space-time ancestral realm, it will be difficult to get a similar opportunity!"

"Lord of the Ancients, I'm really not suitable to go to the Space-Time Ancestral Realm!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

"Why?"

The Lord of the Ancient was puzzled, was there any suggestion that it was not suitable to go to the Space-Time Ancestral Realm? It was the first time he had heard it.

"Lord of the Ancients, please look!"

Ye Tian no longer suppressed the extreme aura on his body.

Rumble!

An aura of extreme Dao permeated from Ye Tian's body.

Time Pole, Space Pole, Life Pole, Death Pole, Speed Pole, Gold Pole, Water Pole......

A large number of Extreme Dao enveloped Ye Tian, and there were too many of them.

Of course, Ye Tian only showed a part of the Extreme Dao, but even so, it shocked the Lord of Canggu.

"What, you have realized so many extreme paths???? "The Lord of the Ancient Realms was dumbfounded, "Ordinary super-level perfect controllers can only comprehend a few extreme paths, and if you want to comprehend other extreme paths, it is too difficult, you can't do it at all!"

At this moment, he finally knew why Ye Tian didn't dare to go to the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, if he went, once the Extreme Dao List was announced, countless powerhouses in the entire realm would be shocked.

At that time, Ye Tian will be in great trouble.

"Lord of the Ancients, I created an Extreme Dao Life Devouring Technique, devouring an incomparably terrifying Extreme Dao creature, the other party's potential is high and terrifying, after I swallowed it, I inherited its potential, and it was easier to comprehend the Extreme Dao, so I created a lot of Extreme Dao in a short period of time. Ye Tian said.

He revealed that the Extreme Dao Life Devouring Technique was also because this secret technique could only be passed down once, so he was not afraid to say it.

Besides, having said this, the Lord of the Canggu did not doubt it, otherwise it would be difficult for him to explain.

"I see, you're really lucky!"

The Lord of the Ancient sighed.

Then, the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty said, "However, if you don't go to the Space-Time Ancestral Realm like this, there are many people who doubt it. In fact, if you don't want the Extreme Dao Rank to spy on the power of the Extreme Dao in you, it's not impossible. In this way, this seat will give you a treasure, and after you refine it, you can cover the other extreme paths on your body, and if you want to show a few extreme paths, you can reveal a few of them. However, this seat is only temporarily lent to you and will have to be returned later. "

Immediately, the Lord of the Ancient took out a bead.

"Super Perfect Treasure!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

Sure enough, there were more than six super-grade perfect treasures in the Wudao Tower.

"This is a super-perfect treasure - the Hidden Breath Bead, which contains the Hidden Extreme Path, even if you have comprehended a similar Extreme Path, you can't completely cover the Extreme Path on your body, but it can do it. The Extreme Dao List is an Extreme Dao Treasure that surpasses the super-level Perfection Treasure, but the Hidden Breath Bead is very close to the Extreme Treasure and is therefore able to do it. The Lord of the Ancient said.

"Thank you, Lord of the Ancients!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

Immediately, he took the Hidden Breath Bead of the Lord of Canggu and took it to refine.

Subsequently, the Lord of Canggu left Ye Tian's branch tower.

"Ye Tian is not simple, even I can't see through it, he is very likely to break the shackles with his own extreme way and achieve the realm of perfect controller, in that case, there is a great hope of surpassing me in the future!"

The Lord of the Ancient muttered.

It is precisely because Ye Tian has potential that he will help Ye Tian, this is a kind of investment.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to completely refine the Hidden Breath Bead.

Subsequently, he entered the Space-Time Ancestral Realm.
